# Toolify365

> Toolify365 is a collection of free online calculators and converters — health, math, finance, date/time, text, and color tools. Each tool page includes a working calculator, a how-it-works explainer, worked examples, and an FAQ. Available in 17 languages (English primary, /{locale}/ paths). All tools are embeddable via iframe (see any tool's Share menu).

## Tools

- [CAGR Calculator (Compound Annual Growth Rate)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/cagr-calculator)
- [Car Loan Calculator (monthly payment + total interest)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/car-loan-calculator)
- [Compound Interest Calculator (with monthly contributions)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/compound-interest-calculator)
- [Discount Calculator (with optional sales tax)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/discount-calculator)
- [Expense Ratio Calculator — True Cost of Investment Fees](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/investment-fee-impact-calculator)
- [Loan Amortization Schedule (full or yearly)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/loan-amortization-schedule)
- [Loan Calculator (monthly payment, interest, total cost)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/loan-calculator)
- [Markup Calculator (cost to sell price + margin)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/markup-calculator)
- [Mortgage Calculator (PITI: principal, interest, tax, insurance)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/mortgage-calculator)
- [ROAS Calculator (Return on Ad Spend)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/roas-calculator)
- [Salary Converter (hourly, daily, weekly, monthly, annual)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/salary-converter)
- [Sales Tax / VAT Calculator (add tax or extract from total)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/sales-tax-calculator)
- [Tip Calculator (with bill split for groups)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/tip-calculator)
- [Free Unit Price Calculator 2026 — Cost per Gram, Ounce or Count](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/unit-price-calculator)
- [BMI Calculator (metric & imperial, with category)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/bmi-calculator)
- [BMR Calculator (Mifflin, Harris-Benedict, Katch-McArdle)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/bmr-calculator)
- [Body Fat Calculator (US Navy Method)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/body-fat-calculator)
- [Calorie Calculator (BMR & TDEE, Mifflin-St Jeor)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/calorie-calculator)
- [Conception Date Calculator — from due date or birth date](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/conception-date-calculator)
- [Due Date Calculator — LMP, IVF, ultrasound or conception](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/due-date-calculator)
- [hCG Calculator — doubling time & rise from two values](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/hcg-calculator)
- [Period Calculator — next 6 periods & cycle phase](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/menstrual-cycle-calculator)
- [One-Rep Max Calculator (5 formulas + percent table)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/one-rep-max-calculator)
- [Ovulation Calculator — fertile window for irregular cycles](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/ovulation-calculator)
- [Running Pace Calculator (time, pace, speed)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/pace-calculator)
- [Pregnancy Week Calculator — weeks + prenatal schedule](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/pregnancy-week-calculator)
- [Pregnancy Weight Gain Calculator — by pre-pregnancy BMI](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/pregnancy-weight-gain-calculator)
- [Water Intake Calculator (daily target by weight)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/water-intake-calculator)
- [Caesar Cipher Encoder / Decoder (with ROT13)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/caesar-cipher)
- [Character Frequency Analyzer (letters, all chars, or words)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/character-frequency)
- [Password Generator (cryptographically secure, with strength meter)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/password-generator)
- [Reverse Text Generator — Flip Characters, Words, or Lines](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/reverse-text-generator)
- [Free Roman Numeral Converter 2026 — Numbers 1–3999 (Both Directions)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/roman-numeral-converter)
- [Find and Replace Text (literal or regex, with options)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/text-replace)
- [Word Counter (with reading and speaking time)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/word-counter)
- [WPM Typing Speed Test 2026 — Free Words Per Minute Counter](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/wpm-counter)
- [Fraction Calculator (add, subtract, multiply, divide)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/fraction-calculator)
- [GPA Calculator (4.0 scale, weighted by credits)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/gpa-calculator)
- [Number Base Converter (binary, octal, decimal, hex)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/number-base-converter)
- [Paint Calculator (gallons or liters from room size)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/paint-calculator)
- [Percentage Calculator (% of, what %, % change)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/percentage-calculator)
- [Currency Converter — 31 Currencies, Instant Results](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/currency-converter)
- [Fuel Economy Converter (mpg US/UK, km/L, L/100km)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/fuel-economy-converter)
- [Length Converter (mm, cm, m, km, in, ft, yd, mi)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/length-converter)
- [Power Unit Converter (W, kW, hp, BTU/h)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/power-converter)
- [Pressure Converter (Pa, bar, psi, atm, mmHg)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/pressure-converter)
- [Speed Converter (km/h, mph, m/s, knot, Mach)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/speed-converter)
- [Temperature Converter (Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin, Rankine)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/temperature-converter)
- [Time Unit Converter (ms, s, min, h, days, weeks, months, years)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/time-converter)
- [Weight Converter (kg, g, t, lb, oz, stone, mg)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/weight-converter)
- [Age Calculator (years, months, days, weeks, hours)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/age-calculator)
- [Age Difference Calculator (between two people)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/age-difference-calculator)
- [Free Countdown Timer 2026 — Days, Hours, Minutes, Seconds (No Signup)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/countdown-timer)
- [Date Calculator (add/subtract days, or difference between dates)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/date-calculator)
- [ISO Week Number Calculator (week-of-year)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/iso-week-calculator)
- [Stopwatch (millisecond precision, lap times)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/stopwatch)
- [Timezone Converter (compare time across multiple zones)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/timezone-converter)
- [Workdays Calculator (skip weekends + holidays)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/workdays-calculator)
- [Grade Calculator — Weighted Average & Letter Grade](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/grade-calculator)
- [Steps to Distance Calculator — km, Miles, Calories & Time](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/steps-to-distance-calculator)
- [Password Strength Tester (entropy + crack time)](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/password-strength-tester)
- [ASCII Table — Decimal, Hex, Binary, Octal & Character Chart](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/ascii-table)
- [Heat Index Calculator — Feels Like Temperature & Humidity](https://toolify365.com/en/tools/heat-index-calculator)
